chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S-329 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of post-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of post-arrest bail 05-5-2025 Mr. Muhammad Ali Memon, Advocate for the applicant Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional Prosecutor General for the State.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- After arguing at some length, learned counsel for the applicant submits that he would be satisfied and shall not press the bail application if directions are issued to the trial court for concluding the trial within the shortest possible time. Accordingly, the bail application is disposed of with a direction to the trial court to conclude the trial positively within three months. The trial court is also directed that no unnecessary adjournments are granted to either party. In the event the court finds that witnesses are avoiding appearance for recording their evidence, coercive processes shall be issued to secure their attendance. J U D G E Naveed Ali
